text.headline: The Geographic Arc
text.text: A computational geoscientist's journey from European geology to planetary science.

text.headline: Edinburgh / Geological Foundation
text.text: BSc in Geology from the University of Edinburgh with multiple prizes and awards.

text.headline: MIT-WHOI / Oceanography
text.text: MS in Oceanography from the MIT-WHOI Joint Program with Presidential Graduate Fellowship.

text.headline: Cambridge / Mathematical Pivot
text.text: MPhil in Fluid Flow from Cambridge University, marking the shift toward applied mathematics.

text.headline: Stanford / Doctoral Specialization
text.text: PhD in Petroleum Engineering, establishing expertise in porous media and fluid dynamics.

text.headline: Austin / Faculty Career
text.text: Building a research program at UT Austin from Assistant Professor to Dave P. Carlton Centennial Professor.
